title: Altered taste in diabetics: 11 herbal teas to explore
description: Lavandula angustifolia teas are known to help with taste changes, particularly in relation to bitter tastes. The tea's properties, including linalool and linalyl acetate, are responsible for this effect. These constituents have been shown to have a numbing effect on the taste buds, reducing the perception of bitter flavors.
